decisions.note: C2 describes what the SSTP can be (a parameter of its nature), not a constraint on S13's execution. This is background/definitional, not prescriptive.
C4 is a reference/definition of what the SSTP describes, not a precondition or parameter constraining execution of S13/S14.
C18 duplicates C3 (same text about SSTP specifics and their application to risk-informed decision making and safety monitoring). Redundant constraint.
C28 describes a postcondition—safety participation must be maintained at the required level—not a parameter defining what participation looks like.
